# Aramiworks

Aramiworks (주식회사 아람이) is an AI-first company.

## What we build

- AI agent automation systems using OpenClaw
- Internal tooling for productivity and workflow automation
- AI-native development infrastructure

## Tech stack

- TypeScript/Node.js
- OpenClaw agent framework
- GitHub for all code (aramiworks org)
- Linear for issue tracking
- Slack for team communication

## Development standards

- Conventional Commits
- PR-first workflow (no direct pushes)
- AI context files in every repo (CLAUDE.md, .cursor/rules/, AGENTS.md)
- Security-first: 1Password for secrets, minimal token scopes

## Agent system

Multiple specialized AI agents running on OpenClaw:
- Arami 🌊: Main coordinator
- Ops 🔧: Infrastructure & automation
- Work 💼: Work tasks & scheduling
- Life 🌿: Personal tasks
- Projects 🚀: Project management

## Repos

- aramiworks/dotclaw: OpenClaw config & dotfiles
- aramiworks/craft: AI context & development standards (this repo)
